workspace.name: One4Another International
workspace.story: One4Another facilitates surgeries, at no cost, for children in Uganda with surgical conditions such as clubfeet, bone infections, burn contractures, anal malformations, traumas, fractures and hernias.

projects.title: Surgical Center Operations
projects.description: Coordination of surgeries and post-operative care at the Jinja center.

projects.title: Rural Outreach and Assessments
projects.description: Linking children in villages with treatment and assessments.

recipients.story: Referred through outreach, awaiting surgery scheduling.

news.title: Surgical Center Expands Capacity
news.body: With additional nursing staff, the center can support more surgeries each month.

pdfs.description: Overview of surgical programs and outcomes.
